{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Human Resources Manager",
  "description": "Belton Global Limited offers a wide range of services some of which are the Sales, Production and Installation services. Sales Department offers the sales of building materials such as Executive jaccuzzi, steamers, shower rooms, hot tubs, saunas with out standing features (massagers,radios and so on), shower cubicules, shower trays, power showers, standing showers and elevated showers of different colours, designs and sizes, cover baths, fibre baths, bath mixers, assorted brands of ceramic toilet seats &amp; bath tubs, bidet, uriners, bathroom accessories, 3-step towel rails, glass basins, glass block, glass shelves, designed mirrors, soap dish, unique toilet brushes &amp; foot mats, different brands &amp; liters of water heater and over head tanks, swimming pool materials, bore hole materials, squats, PVC.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an HR Manager to oversee all aspects of human resources practices and processes.


What is an HR Manager?


	To us, an HR Manager is the go-to person for all employee-related issues.
	This means that your HR Manager duties will involve managing activities such as job design,&nbsp;recruitment, employee relations, performance management, training &amp; development and&nbsp;talent management.
	The job of HR Manager is important to business success.
	People are our most important asset and you&rsquo;ll be the one to ensure we have a happy and productive workplace where everyone works to realize our established mission and objectives.
	Promoting corporate values and shaping a positive culture is a vital aspect of a complete HR Manager job description and specification.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies and initiatives aligned with the overall business strategy
	Bridge management and employee relations by addressing demands, grievances or other issues
	Manage the recruitment and selection process
	Support current and future business needs through the development, engagement, motivation and preservation of human capital
	Develop and monitor overall HR strategies, systems, tactics and procedures across the organization
	Nurture a positive working environment
	Oversee and manage a performance appraisal system that drives high performance
	Maintain pay plan and benefits program
	Assess training needs to apply and monitor training programs
	Report to management and provide decision support through HR metrics
	Ensure legal compliance throughouthuman resource management.


Requirements and skills


	Proven working experience as HR Manager or other HR Executive
	People oriented and results driven
	Demonstrable experience with Human Resources metrics
	Knowledge of HR systems and databases
	Ability to architect strategy along with leadership skills
	Excellent active listening, negotiation and presentation skills
	Competence to build and effectively manage interpersonal relationships at all levels of the company
	In-depth knowledge of labor law and&nbsp;HR best practices.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;beltongloballimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-26",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Belton Global Global Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {

    "value": "195910"
  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Human Resources Manager Job at Belton Global Limited




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Belton Global Limited offers a wide range of services some of which are the Sales, Production and Installation services. Sales Department offers the sales of building materials such as Executive jaccuzzi, steamers, shower rooms, hot tubs, saunas with out standing features (massagers,radios and so on), shower cubicules, shower trays, power showers, standing showers and elevated showers of different colours, designs and sizes, cover baths, fibre baths, bath mixers, assorted brands of ceramic toilet seats & bath tubs, bidet, uriners, bathroom accessories, 3-step towel rails, glass basins, glass block, glass shelves, designed mirrors, soap dish, unique toilet brushes & foot mats, different brands & liters of water heater and over head tanks, swimming pool materials, bore hole materials, squats, PVC.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Manager
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for an HR Manager to oversee all aspects of human resources practices and processes.


What is an HR Manager?


	To us, an HR Manager is the go-to person for all employee-related issues.
	This means that your HR Manager duties will involve managing activities such as job design, recruitment, employee relations, performance management, training & development and talent management.
	The job of HR Manager is important to business success.
	People are our most important asset and you’ll be the one to ensure we have a happy and productive workplace where everyone works to realize our established mission and objectives.
	Promoting corporate values and shaping a positive culture is a vital aspect of a complete HR Manager job description and specification.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR strategies and initiatives aligned with the overall business strategy
	Bridge management and employee relations by addressing demands, grievances or other issues
	Manage the recruitment and selection process
	Support current and future business needs through the development, engagement, motivation and preservation of human capital
	Develop and monitor overall HR strategies, systems, tactics and procedures across the organization
	Nurture a positive working environment
	Oversee and manage a performance appraisal system that drives high performance
	Maintain pay plan and benefits program
	Assess training needs to apply and monitor training programs
	Report to management and provide decision support through HR metrics
	Ensure legal compliance throughouthuman resource management.


Requirements and skills


	Proven working experience as HR Manager or other HR Executive
	People oriented and results driven
	Demonstrable experience with Human Resources metrics
	Knowledge of HR systems and databases
	Ability to architect strategy along with leadership skills
	Excellent active listening, negotiation and presentation skills
	Competence to build and effectively manage interpersonal relationships at all levels of the company
	In-depth knowledge of labor law and HR best practices.


Salary
N150,000 - N300,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Secretary",
  "description": "Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Objective


	To provide high-level administrative support to the Audit and Tax teams, ensuring seamless office operations, professional client relations, and meticulous management of financial documents and correspondence.


Key Responsibilities
Document Management:


	Assist in the formatting, printing, and binding of Audit reports, financial statements, and tax letters.


Client Relations:


	Receive and direct clients, manage the office switchboard, and handle inquiries with extreme professionalism.


Filing &amp; Archiving:


	Maintain a highly organized physical and digital filing system for sensitive client records, ensuring easy retrieval for auditors.


Scheduling:


	Manage the firm&rsquo;s calendar, including scheduling client audits, tax filing deadlines, and internal partner meetings.


Correspondence:


	Draft and proofread professional letters, emails, and memos to regulatory bodies (like LIRS/FIRS) and clients.


Office Logistics:


	Monitor office supplies, manage petty cash for daily office expenses, and ensure the reception area is always presentable.


Minimum Qualifications
Education:


	
	OND / HND /&nbsp;B.Sc in Office Technology Management, Secretarial Studies, Business Administration, or any related field.
	


Experience:


	
	0 &ndash; 3 years of experience
	


Technical Skills:


	
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word(advanced formatting) and Excel.
	
	
	Strong typing speed and accuracy.
	


Soft Skills:


	Exceptional command of English (Written and Oral).
	Discretion: Ability to handle confidential financial information with integrity.
	High attention to detail (zero tolerance for typos in financial documents).


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.",

Secretary Job at Tribest Corporate Support Limited




        
    

        
        Tribest is a corporate support solutions provider with a comprehensive range of people outsourcing services. We have a diversified team of management, strategy, banking and capacity development experts working together to provide organizations with the best human resource management solutions. With a team that diverse, we are setting new standards of performance and raising the bar in excellent service delivery.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Objective
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	To provide high-level administrative support to the Audit and Tax teams, ensuring seamless office operations, professional client relations, and meticulous management of financial documents and correspondence.


Key Responsibilities
Document Management:


	Assist in the formatting, printing, and binding of Audit reports, financial statements, and tax letters.


Client Relations:


	Receive and direct clients, manage the office switchboard, and handle inquiries with extreme professionalism.


Filing & Archiving:


	Maintain a highly organized physical and digital filing system for sensitive client records, ensuring easy retrieval for auditors.


Scheduling:


	Manage the firm’s calendar, including scheduling client audits, tax filing deadlines, and internal partner meetings.


Correspondence:


	Draft and proofread professional letters, emails, and memos to regulatory bodies (like LIRS/FIRS) and clients.


Office Logistics:


	Monitor office supplies, manage petty cash for daily office expenses, and ensure the reception area is always presentable.


Minimum Qualifications
Education:


	
	OND / HND / B.Sc in Office Technology Management, Secretarial Studies, Business Administration, or any related field.
	


Experience:


	
	0 – 3 years of experience
	


Technical Skills:


	
	Proficiency in Microsoft Word(advanced formatting) and Excel.
	
	
	Strong typing speed and accuracy.
	


Soft Skills:


	Exceptional command of English (Written and Oral).
	Discretion: Ability to handle confidential financial information with integrity.
	High attention to detail (zero tolerance for typos in financial documents).


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 per month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Clinical Pharmacist",
  "description": "Solid Rock Hospital is a reputable healthcare institution committed to providing high-quality, patient-centered medical services. We are seeking a qualified, dedicated, and experienced&nbsp;Clinical Pharmacist&nbsp;to join our healthcare team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Clinical Pharmacist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description / Responsibilities


	Review and validate prescriptions to ensure accuracy, safety, and appropriateness.
	Provide clinical pharmacy services in collaboration with doctors, nurses, and other healthcare professionals.
	Monitor patient drug therapy and make recommendations for dosage adjustments where necessary.
	Counsel patients on the proper use of medications and possible side effects.
	Ensure proper storage, dispensing, and documentation of all medications.
	Participate in ward rounds and clinical meetings when required.
	Maintain accurate pharmacy records in line with hospital policies and regulatory standards.
	Ensure compliance with all professional, legal, and ethical guidelines governing pharmacy practice.
	Supervise pharmacy technicians and support staff where applicable.
	Assist in inventory management and ensure availability of essential drugs.


Requirements / Qualifications


	Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D) from a recognized institution.
	Minimum of 2 years of clinical pharmacy experience in a hospital setting is an added advantage.
	Must be fully registered with the Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN).
	Valid practicing license.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary team.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;takpa.t@solidrockhospital.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Clinical Pharmacist Job at Solid Rock Hospital




        
    

        
        Solid Rock Hospital is a reputable healthcare institution committed to providing high-quality, patient-centered medical services. We are seeking a qualified, dedicated, and experienced Clinical Pharmacist to join our healthcare team.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Clinical Pharmacist

Job Location: Ojodu Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description / Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Review and validate prescriptions to ensure accuracy, safety, and appropriateness.
	Provide clinical pharmacy services in collaboration with doctors, nurses, and other healthcare professionals.
	Monitor patient drug therapy and make recommendations for dosage adjustments where necessary.
	Counsel patients on the proper use of medications and possible side effects.
	Ensure proper storage, dispensing, and documentation of all medications.
	Participate in ward rounds and clinical meetings when required.
	Maintain accurate pharmacy records in line with hospital policies and regulatory standards.
	Ensure compliance with all professional, legal, and ethical guidelines governing pharmacy practice.
	Supervise pharmacy technicians and support staff where applicable.
	Assist in inventory management and ensure availability of essential drugs.


Requirements / Qualifications


	Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm) or Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D) from a recognized institution.
	Minimum of 2 years of clinical pharmacy experience in a hospital setting is an added advantage.
	Must be fully registered with the Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN).
	Valid practicing license.
	Good communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a multidisciplinary team.
	High level of professionalism and integrity.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Energy Management Officer Job at Ibadan Electricity Distribution Company (IBEDC) Plc




        
    

        
        Ibadan Electricity Distribution Company (IBEDC) Plc, headquartered in Ibadan, is responsible for electricity distribution within the south western zone (Oyo, Ogun, Osun and kwara as well as some parts of Kogi, Ekiti and Niger states). We are an organization with a focus on delivering excellent service to the customers and providing customer satisfaction through reliable power distributions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Energy Management Officer

Job Locations: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Networking analysis of Energy usage.


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.

	Provide general administrative support to the sales team.


Requirements


	B.Sc (2nd class lower) / HND
	Minimum of 1 year of experience
	NYSC Certificate
	Entrepreneurial Mindset
	Sales Persuasiveness
	Team Player.


Method of Application
